task_completion.description: Verify the base cylinder dimensions are set correctly in the sketch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for dimension constraints in the SolveSpace workspace showing a height of 50.00 and an outer diameter of 40.00 (or radius of 20.00).

task_completion.description: Verify the O-ring groove dimensions are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for dimension constraints showing the groove is 4.00 wide, 3.00 deep (or inner diameter 34.00 / radius 17.00), and positioned exactly 10.00 below the top edge.

task_completion.description: Verify the 3D model of the piston with the groove has been generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace 3D view should display a solid cylindrical object with a rectangular groove cut into its outer surface near the top.

task_completion.description: Verify the parametric model is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SolveSpace window title bar displaying 'piston_groove.slvs', or a 'Save As' dialog saving the file to the 'Documents/SolveSpace' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the 3D solid is exported as a STEP file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Export' dialog in SolveSpace saving 'piston_groove.step', or a file manager/terminal window showing 'piston_groove.step' exists in the 'Documents/SolveSpace' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application interface should be visible with the 3D model being actively constructed, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not mock the output files using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open displaying the raw text contents of a .slvs or .step file.

integrity.description: Verify the STEP file was genuinely exported from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the 'File -> Export' menu or export dialogs within SolveSpace, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to create the .step file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected SLVS file path is '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/piston_groove.slvs'. The expected STEP file path is '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/piston_groove.step'. The exact dimensions to look for in the SolveSpace sketches are: base cylinder height 50.0mm, outer diameter 40.0mm (or radius 20.0mm); groove width 4.0mm, groove depth 3.0mm (or inner diameter 34.0mm / inner radius 17.0mm), and groove offset 10.0mm from the top face.
